title: rhamnus lycioides f. angustifolia
intro: Rhamnus lycioides f. angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Frangula, is a plant species within the Rhamnaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The Narrow-leaved Frangula has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and liver conditions, due to its ability to stimulate bowel movements and aid in detoxification. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support liver health and alleviate symptoms of constipation.
